title: trigonella monantha subsp. noeana
intro: Trigonella monantha subsp. noeana, also known as Nigella seed or black cumin, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trigonella monantha subsp. noeana include potential relief from digestive issues, stress, and anxiety, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
